form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd of 12 at this track Cl2 on March 13 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Cantilever carrying 60.5kg at $3.20. The race before that favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.1 len at this track Cl2 February 28 over 1417m defeating Truly Gallant carrying 59kg at $8.50. Hard to knock on recent form and can put his best foot forward again.
